messages.content: 4.	The Auditors pointed in the Management letter that the bikes log book is not maintained.
The auditors noted in the Management letter that the log book for the bikes is not being maintained.
5.	The admin department suggested that the bike is old and need a lot repair maintenance. It may be disposed off.
The admin department has recommended that the old bike be disposed of due to the high repair and maintenance costs associated with it.
6.	Chairman said the matter may be presented in the fianance committee.
The chairman suggested that the matter be presented to the finance committee for further discussion and decision-making.
7.	Internal Auditor: Mr. Hamid said that we deeply need an Internal Auditor. It is requested that Mr. Kaleem may be appointed as Internal Auditor.
The internal auditor, Mr. Hamid, emphasized the need for an internal auditor and suggested that Mr. Kaleem be appointed to this role.
8.	Chairman approved it with subject to Mr Kaleem’s agreement
The chairman approved the appointment of Mr. Kaleem as the internal auditor, pending his agreement to take on the role.
9.	Mr. Kaleem will discuss the suggestion with Mr Hamid then the decision will be finalized
Mr. Kaleem will hold discussions with Mr. Hamid regarding the suggestion, and the final decision regarding his appointment as the internal auditor will then be made.
10.	Mr. Kaleem informed the board that specific approavls are required on the points in the board letter
Mr. Kaleem notified the board that specific approvals are necessary for the points mentioned in the board letter.
The board discussed the observations of the auditors thoroughly.
The board extensively deliberated on the observations made by the auditors.
a)	Letter of representation addressed to us on behalf of the Board of Directors and signed by the Chief Executive and Finance Coordinator as per draft provided by us.

A letter of representation, addressed to us, was discussed with regards to it being signed by the Chief Executive and Finance Coordinator on behalf of the Board of Directors, as per the provided draft letter.
•	The house was informed that M/S BDO Ebrahim & Co was appointed as the Auditor of HELP IN NEED 2 year ago.  They have reviewed  the accounts thoroughly and prepared the Audit Report

The board was informed that M/S BDO Ebrahim & Co has been serving as the auditor for HELP IN NEED for the past two years. They have conducted a thorough review of the accounts and prepared the Audit Report.
•	It is requested that The Board of Directors (B0D)  recommended that M/s BDO Ebrahim & Co as Auditors for the next fiscal year.
The Board of Directors (BOD) has recommended that M/s BDO Ebrahim & Co continue to serve as auditors for the next fiscal year.
